summary: Completed comprehensive testing of The Beat 515 radio station app. Backend API fully functional (19/19 tests passed). Frontend mostly working with critical admin panel routing issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin route (/admin) shows homepage content instead of admin panel
ui_bugs.details: Admin login successful, navigation to /admin works, but admin panel content (stats, users, requests tabs) not loading. Shows homepage content instead.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend routing issue - admin route not rendering correct component

design_issues.issue: Some navigation links (Leaderboard, Recently Played, About, Contact, Careers) not visible in main navbar
design_issues.details: Pages exist and work when accessed directly, but links not prominently displayed in main navigation

passed_tests: Backend API health check (19/19 tests passed)
Homepage loads with hero section, shows, news sections
Navigation bar functionality for main links
News page with category filters and articles
Requests page with form and chat functionality
All missing pages exist (Leaderboard, Recently Played, About, Contact, Careers)
Now Playing bar at bottom of page
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical admin panel routing issue - admin route (/admin) is not rendering the admin component correctly. Shows homepage content instead of admin panel with stats/users/requests tabs. Check React Router configuration and admin route protection logic.
